method_description: Coarse livestock activity bundle dominated by methane and nitrous oxide emissions, plus diesel/electricity/gas use on farms.
evidence_summary: Anchored to official agriculture energy totals, official agriculture emissions totals, and ABS output-value data, with explicit bundle-allocation assumptions.
derivation_method: Coarse residual-sector synthesis. Official agriculture energy and emissions totals are allocated to two output bundles using transparent assumptions so the MVP model can retain agriculture without process-level build-out.
review_notes: This is a coarse residual sector block intended to preserve agriculture in national emissions accounting, not a farm-system model.

method_description: Livestock activity bundle with representative methane, manure and productivity improvements plus moderate on-farm energy efficiency.
evidence_summary: Anchored to official agriculture energy totals, official agriculture emissions totals, and ABS output-value data, with explicit bundle-allocation assumptions.
derivation_method: Coarse residual-sector synthesis. Official agriculture energy and emissions totals are allocated to two output bundles using transparent assumptions so the MVP model can retain agriculture without process-level build-out.
review_notes: Highly simplified mitigation method. Use for coarse sensitivity only until a proper agricultural abatement supply model is built.
